title: Squirrel Removal in Pelham Gardens, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Pelham Gardens, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving the Bronx. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Pelham Gardens home or attic? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout this beautiful Bronx neighborhood. Our humane removal and exclusion methods protect your property from damage while ensuring these persistent pests don't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Pelham Gardens residents for years with safe, effective squirrel removal that addresses both immediate infestations and long-term prevention. Our licensed technicians understand the unique architecture of Pelham Gardens homes and provide customized solutions with full warranties.
localContext: Pelham Gardens' tree-lined streets and proximity to Pelham Bay Park create an ideal environment for squirrel activity, with these agile pests frequently accessing the neighborhood's Tudor and Colonial-style homes through rooflines and attic vents. The mature oak and maple trees throughout the area provide natural highways for squirrels seeking shelter in residential properties, especially during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Pelham Gardens typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and sanitization of affected areas.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Pelham Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Pelham Gardens homes through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. The area's mature trees allow easy access to rooflines, and squirrels can squeeze through openings as small as 1.5 inches to nest in attics and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal squirrel removal methods in Pelham Gardens. We employ live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, followed by comprehensive sealing of entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Pelham Gardens property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Pelham Gardens for emergency squirrel situations. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present, though sealing and exclusion work can often be completed in one visit once all animals are removed.
